issues.title: Vertex AI Text Embedding uses the wrong property for task_type

comments.body: Thanks @markpollack , I also noticed that this [builder](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/ce8e8b9d7c58f272628f0b106c819d009605dd51/models/spring-ai-vertex-ai-embedding/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/vertexai/embedding/text/VertexAiTextEmbeddingOptions.java#L180C18-L194) method does not automatically pick up the `autoTruncate` option.  I wasn't sure if that was deliberately removed from the default options that are merged [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/ce8e8b9d7c58f272628f0b106c819d009605dd51/models/spring-ai-vertex-ai-embedding/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/vertexai/embedding/text/VertexAiTextEmbeddingModel.java#L170-L171).
prob an oversight, will check it out.
